architectureDecision.label: All domains enabled when omitted
architectureDecision.rationale: When planning.canonicalSync.domains is omitted and git-event-log is active, default enables tasks, phaseCatalog, workspaceStatus, phaseNotes, phaseNoteSuggestions, ideas, moduleState.

readyReview.decision: Default domain list is full Phase 119+120 set; operators opt out by editing config.

technicalBreakdown: Add planning.canonicalSync.domains to config registry with default array of all domain ids.
Implement readPlanningSyncDomains helper; default to full list when key omitted.
Gate each domain publish hook and hydrate applier by domain membership.
Document in .ai/CONFIG.md; add config validation test and explain-config surfacing.

acceptanceCriteria: Config key planning.canonicalSync.domains accepts array of domain ids.
When omitted under git-event-log, all Phase 119 and 120 domains are enabled by default.
Disabling a domain skips publish and hydrate apply for that domain only.
doctor or explain-config surfaces effective domain list.
